description_long: This is a vividly colored, curved knife or short sword with a distinctive, almost fantasy-inspired design. The blade is single-edged and features a pronounced curve, tapering to a sharp point, and is adorned with a multicolored, abstract pattern that covers its entire surface. The handle is integrated into the blade's form, with a large circular finger ring at the end, providing a secure grip and additional control. The handle area also displays the same vibrant, swirling pattern as the blade, with no visible separation between blade and grip. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, giving the object a sleek, continuous silhouette. The overall appearance is both artistic and functional, making it stand out as a decorative or collector's piece as well as a potential utility or display weapon.
description: A vividly patterned, curved knife or short sword with a single-edged blade and a large finger ring integrated into the handle. The entire object is covered in a colorful, abstract design, giving it a striking and artistic appearance.
description_view_0: The curved blade and large finger ring are visible, with the vibrant patterning most prominent on the blade's flat surface.
description_view_1: A side profile shows the full length of the blade and handle, highlighting the continuous, colorful pattern and the pronounced curve of the blade.
description_view_2: The view from the opposite side emphasizes the finger ring and the blade's thickness, with the pattern wrapping around the handle.
description_view_3: A mirrored side profile, again showing the full curve and the integration of the handle and blade, with the colorful design clearly visible.
attribute_handle_design: integrated handle with large circular finger ring, smooth, covered in colorful pattern
attribute_ornamentation: multicolored abstract pattern covering entire surface
